sections.paragraph:
Original: פּוּה פּוּאה

Transliteration: pû'âh pûvvâh

Phonetic: poo-aw'

BDB Definition:

Puah or Pua or Phuvah = "splendid"
  1. son of Issachar
    1. also 'Pua' and 'Phuvah'
  2. man of Issachar, father of Tola, the judge of Israel after Abimelech

Origin: from H6284

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
